# Portfolio Website Project - Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
A full-stack portfolio website for a software engineer, website designer, and web application designer.

**Tech Stack:**
- Backend: Django with Django REST Framework
- Frontend: React with Tailwind CSS
- Database: SQLite (development) / PostgreSQL (production-ready)
- Modern UI with fluid, responsive controls

## Setup Progress

- [x] Create project structure
- [x] Set up Django backend
- [x] Set up React frontend
- [x] Configure API integration
- [ ] Install dependencies
- [ ] Run development servers

## Implementation Notes
- REST API for portfolio data (projects, skills, experience)
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS
- Modern animations and fluid UI controls
- Contact form with backend processing
- Admin dashboard for portfolio management

## Running the Project
Backend: `python manage.py runserver`
Frontend: `npm start`
